hero.title: Track Your Time
hero.subtitle: The complete timesheet solution for freelancers and teams. Track hours, manage leave, and get approvals - all in one place.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful features to help you manage time tracking and team productivity.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.description: Log daily work hours with detailed task descriptions. Track regular and overtime hours separately.

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Organize your workforce into teams with leaders and members. Perfect for project-based work.

approvalWorkflow.title: Approval Workflow
approvalWorkflow.description: Multi-level approval process: Team Leader reviews, Admin gives final approval.

leaveManagement.title: Leave Management
leaveManagement.description: Track sick leave, personal leave, and annual leave. Automated balance calculations.

exportReports.title: Export Reports
exportReports.description: Generate professional reports in PDF and Excel formats. Perfect for payroll and billing.

thaiHolidays.title: Thai Holiday Support
thaiHolidays.description: Pre-loaded Thai public holidays including Buddhist holidays. Auto-applied to timesheets.

0.question: Can I try it for free?
0.answer: Yes! The Free plan is available immediately with no time limit. It supports 1 user with PDF & Excel export. No credit card required.

1.question: How secure is my data?
1.answer: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Passwords use bcrypt hashing. We also support OAuth login via Google and GitHub for enhanced security.

2.question: What languages are supported?
2.answer: We support Thai and English. You can switch languages anytime via the button in the top-right corner. Both the UI and exported reports support both languages.

3.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
3.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period. No penalties or hidden fees.

4.question: Does it work on mobile?
4.answer: Yes! The website uses responsive design and works on all devices — mobile phones, tablets, and desktop computers.

5.question: Are Thai holidays updated automatically?
5.answer: Yes, the system includes all Thai public holidays and they are updated annually. You don't need to add them manually.

bulkApprove.confirmDescription: All selected timesheets will be approved
